title: Ctenodon paniculatus

At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, indicating its status as a plant species. The family Sapindaceae is further divided into several genera, with Ctenodon paniculatus being one of them. As a member of the Sapindaceae family, Ctenodon paniculatus shares characteristics and traits with other species within this group.
